历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category fluctuated significantly: approximately 13300 → 40423 → 11134 → 10069 → 13036. The abnormal high ranking in 2022 was due to the splitting of major groups; excluding that, the trend over the past three years is 11134 → 10069 → 13036. In 2025, the ranking shifted back by about 2967 places compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of approximately 13036. The enrollment plan for this university in Hunan's Physics Category was 170 in 2021 → 162 in 2022 → 156 in 2023 → 138 in 2024 → 143 in 2025, showing a gradual annual reduction. The 2026 plan is 114, a decrease of 29 from 2025 (a reduction of about 20.3%), a significant contraction that intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its ranking in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings has steadily risen from 50th in 2021 to 43rd in 2026, indicating enhanced comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2026, no significant negative or positive public opinion signals were found in reputation evaluation documents. It ranks 27th in Douyin popularity (relatively hot), with moderate to high exposure on short video platforms. Zhang Xuefeng has repeatedly recommended its distinctive majors such as Underwater Acoustics Engineering and Nuclear Engineering, which attract some candidates. No historical record of admission cut-off drops. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Control Science and Engineering was rated A, the only A-level discipline at this university. Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering, Underwater Acoustics Engineering, and Nuclear Engineering and Nuclear Technology are national characteristic majors, with significant advantages in the national defense and military industry, strongly attracting candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, closely matching the university's enrollment majors in Automation, Electronic Information, and Computer Science. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Hunan is approximately 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% from 320,192 in 2025, intensifying competition. The university is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, in Northeast China, with no special regional preference in Hunan.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 13036, the significant reduction in the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan by about 20.3%, the increase in Hunan Physics Category candidates by about 8.4%, and the university's rising ranking, competitive pressure has notably increased. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will shift significantly forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 11249, with a range of 10749–11749.

- Automation (including Automation, Robotics Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, etc.)
- Nuclear Engineering and Nuclear Technology (Qian Xuesen Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 11249, with a range of 10749–11749. Candidates within this range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 majors as a reach (especially for high-scoring candidates with clear interest in Computer Science, Automation, Naval Architecture, etc.), and Tier 3 majors as a safety option. The university's Automation (Control Science and Engineering, A-level) and Electronic Information majors are the most competitive directions and should be prioritized.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 10961 → 4963 → 5010 → 4446, showing a clear upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers, intensifying competition); over the past 3 years, rankings went from 4963 → 5010 → 4446, with 2025 moving forward by about 564 places compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of about 4446; the university's History Category enrollment plan in Hunan Province was 9 in 2022 → 13 in 2023 → 23 in 2024 → 19 in 2025, showing an expansion trend; the 2026 plan is 42, an increase of 23 from 2025 (about 121% expansion), a very large expansion, significantly weakening competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; Soft Science Chinese University Ranking rose steadily from 50th in 2021 to 43rd in 2026, with steadily improving comprehensive strength; the 2026 reputation evaluation file did not show any significant negative or positive public opinion signals for this university; Douyin popularity ranking 27th (relatively hot), but content mainly focuses on engineering characteristics, with relatively limited attention from History Category candidates; no historical admission cutoff breaks recorded; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Control Science and Engineering was rated A-level, but the university's History Category enrollment majors (Law, English, Business Administration, Sociology, Ideological and Political Education, etc.) have low correlation with engineering advantage disciplines, with weak disciplinary support.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major has high social popularity but with clear differentiation, Business Administration major has obvious social discouragement, foreign language majors are generally wait-and-see; in 2026, Hunan Province has about 187,000 History Category candidates, an increase of about 31.2% from 142,547 in 2025, expanding the candidate pool; the university is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, in the Northeast region, with no special regional preference in Hunan Province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 4446, the large expansion of about 121% in History Category enrollment in 2026, the increase of about 31.2% in History Category candidates in Hunan Province (expansion far exceeding candidate growth), and the continuously rising university ranking, competitive pressure has significantly weakened; it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will significantly move backward compared to 2025; predicted minimum ranking about 7776, range 7276–8276.
